flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hobe Sound Bible College rose 69% between 2013 and 2015 ($5.7k → $9.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hobe Sound Bible College fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (157 → 112).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hobe Sound Bible College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $9.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Hobe Sound Bible College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $9.1k).
